personal.name: Alejandro Moral Aranda
personal.about: AI and data engineer focused on building reliable data pipelines, analytics automation, and ML-enabled tooling. I combine finance domain knowledge with Python, SQL, R, and JavaScript to ship production systems that clean, validate, and operationalize data. Strong background in reporting automation, forecasting, and workflow design for data-heavy environments.

education.description: Master in Computer Science from the University of Luxembourg, with a focus on advanced algorithms, distributed systems, machine learning, cloud computing, and advanced database systems. The thesis centered on research and development of a scalable AI, data-intensive, or distributed computing system.

Bachelor in Computer Science from the University of Malaga covering data structures, operating systems, databases, computer networks, and software engineering. The program also included artificial intelligence, machine learning, computer architecture, discrete mathematics, and probability and statistics.

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
workExperience.description: Delivered end-to-end software solutions for diverse clients, designing scalable back-end architectures, RESTful APIs, and data-driven applications while leveraging cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP) and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes). Led full project lifecycles from requirements gathering to deployment, developed web and automation solutions (Python, Node.js, JavaScript), optimized databases (SQL/NoSQL), implemented CI/CD pipelines, ensured security best practices, and provided technical consulting across system design, performance optimization, and digital transformation initiatives.

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
workExperience.description: Developed and deployed AI-driven features and web applications, integrating machine learning models into production systems to support business workflows. Designed and maintained scalable web architectures and data pipelines, ensuring high performance and reliability across distributed environments. Worked with Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, React.js, Node.js, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and cloud technologies (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) to deliver end-to-end solutions. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement full-stack solutions, optimize system performance, and deploy AI-enabled services efficiently.

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
workExperience.description: Developed and deployed machine learning and deep learning models, integrating them into production systems for enterprise AI solutions. Built and optimized scalable, data-intensive pipelines and distributed AI systems using Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and cloud technologies (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes). Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver end-to-end AI solutions, ensuring performance, reliability, and maintainability.

projects.title: Data Pipeline Orchestrator
projects.description: A sample orchestration project for cleaning, validating, and scheduling recurring data workflows across reporting systems.

projects.title: Forecasting Workspace
projects.description: A sample analytics workspace used for predictive checks, forecasting experiments, and data quality reviews.

projects.title: Reporting Validation Suite
projects.description: A sample reporting suite for automated checks, reconciliation logic, and templated output generation.

projects.title: ML Feature Lab
projects.description: A sample ML experimentation project for feature testing, model comparison, and dataset preparation.
